title: Enum-level doc: mention lossless round-trip at the type level
description: ChatKind, ChatMemberRole, and OwnerPresence each explain lossless round-trip only in the Unknown variant doc comment. A contributor reading just the enum-level doc (2 lines: description + spec ref) has no hint that the serde impls are manually written or that Unknown preserves the wire string. Compare to BodyType and PushUrgency, whose enum-level docs call out Unknown(String) and state the round-trip guarantee explicitly. Add one sentence to each enum-level doc: 'Unrecognized values are captured in Unknown(String) and serialize back to the original wire string.' This is the first place rustdoc readers land.
close_reason: P4 doc polish; deferred. Not blocking convergence.
